case_title: SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES VS. JACOB TRUJILLO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRUJILLO, JACOB ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TRUJILLO, JACOB COX, JONATHON DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION SERVED NOV-27-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE NOV-27-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT COX, JONATHON
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT TRUJILLO, JACOB COX, JONATHON
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TRUJILLO, JACOB COX, JONATHON
SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND, IN THE EVENT OF DEFAULT, STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TRUJILLO, JACOB
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT TRUJILLO, JACOB COX, JONATHON

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRUJILLO, JACOB COX, JONATHON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1434 HALIBUT COURT, APT. A, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94130, SAN FRANCISCO, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TRUJILLO, JACOB COX, JONATHON
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRUJILLO, JACOB

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION SERVED NOV-27-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRUJILLO, JACOB

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION SERVED NOV-27-2018, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
